# Energy Direct — Texas Electricity (independent Ambit Energy consultant)
> Energy Direct helps Texas homeowners compare and switch electricity plans by ZIP. A local, independent Ambit Energy consultant — a real Texan, not a call center. Phone/text (361) 582-9724.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://energydirect.org/): compare Texas electricity by ZIP and enroll online
- [Service Areas](https://energydirect.org/service-areas/): coverage across deregulated Texas, by utility (TDU)
- [Texas Electricity Guide](https://energydirect.org/texas/): deregulation, ERCOT, how to choose & switch
- [Solar Buyback Calculator](https://energydirect.org/solar/): estimate solar buyback credit
- [No-Deposit & Switching](https://energydirect.org/no-deposit-electricity/): no-deposit options + $250 cancellation-fee reimbursement
- [Payment Options](https://energydirect.org/payment-options/), [About](https://energydirect.org/about/), [Our Purpose](https://energydirect.org/our-purpose/)
